query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 | parse regex "\s\[(?<Log_Level>\S+)\]\s\d+#\d+:\s(?:\*\d+\s|)(?<Message>[A-Za-z][^,]+)(?:,|$)"
| parse  "client: *, server: *, request: \"* * HTTP/1.1\", host: \"*\"" as  c_ip, cs_host, cs_method, cs_uri_stem, Host nodrop
| where log_level in ("emerg", "alert", "crit")
| where !isEmpty( c_ip)
| count by  c_ip
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

sources.dashboardDescription: The Nginx - Error Logs Analysis Dashboard provides a high-level view of log level breakdowns,  comparisons, and trends. The panels also show the geographic locations of clients and clients with critical messages, new connections and outliers, client requests, request trends, and request outliers.
